channel.title: Twitter Timeline RSS
channel.description: 你的 Twitter Following Timeline（via opencli）

item.title:
Welcome to the Binance AI Community 🙌
We’d like to see how Binance AI has elevated your trading exp...
item.description:
Welcome to the Binance AI Community 🙌
We’d like to see how Binance AI has elevated your trading experience, be it AI trading bots, agents or market sentiment analysis!
3 simple steps: 🔸 Follow @binance + RT this post 🔸 Share one screenshot of your prompt/usage and Binance AI’s output with #BinanceAI 🔸 Complete the survey → https://t.co/pkNkdwGQQC
10 users win 100 USDC each.
Ends 20 April 23:59 UTC.
--- @binance | ❤️ 183 | 🔁 59 | 💬 59 | 👁 12043
item.author: @binance

item.title: 群里看到这张图，gpt image 2 太离谱了 连身份证号码规则都是对的 照片的真实性不存在了 需要愈加小心的世界 （不过这个身份证虽然前几位是对的，但最后校验位是错的） https://t.co/...
item.description:
群里看到这张图，gpt image 2 太离谱了 连身份证号码规则都是对的 照片的真实性不存在了 需要愈加小心的世界 （不过这个身份证虽然前几位是对的，但最后校验位是错的） https://t.co/qIKyLMwbL6
--- @oran_ge | ❤️ 19 | 🔁 0 | 💬 9 | 👁 2349
item.author: @oran_ge

item.title: Destroying a library brings the dark ages.
item.author: @ylecun
